command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "cat > /tmp/fix_hermes3.sh << 'SHEOF'
#!/bin/bash
cd /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent

# Stop our broken service first
systemctl --user stop hermes-agent 2>/dev/null
systemctl --user disable hermes-agent 2>/dev/null

# Try --yes flag or --non-interactive
/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/hermes gateway install --help 2>&1 | head -20
SHEOF
bash /tmp/fix_hermes3.sh"
